AU_ADVANCEDBSCHEMA.tempString: <entry key = "-1"> <entry key = 'public."employee"'><sql name = 'public."employee"' key = '' fkey = '' updateKey ='emp_id' schemaName ='public' >SELECT emp_id,first_name,last_name,email,phone_number,hire_date,job_title,salary,department FROM "public"."employee"</sql> </entry> </entry>
